characters.appearance: Young adult female, slim build, light complexion. Dark hair styled in multiple small buns/knots on top of her head. Distinctive styling.
characters.wardrobe: White t-shirt with a graphic print, black cargo pants, chunky sneakers. Accessorized with multiple necklaces (including a cross) and large hoop earrings.

characters.appearance: White, humanoid robot with a smooth, metallic finish. Features blue eyes and a glowing blue circular core on its chest.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: Interview में हमेशा "I'm fine, thank you" बोलना बंद करो। [Stop saying "I'm fine, thank you" in every interview.]
Character A says: सच बताऊँ, मेरी English भी ऐसी ही थी, फिर मैंने Supernova try किया। [Honestly, my English was just like this, then I tried Supernova.]
Character A says: Let me show you. [Let me show you.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Hooks the viewer by pointing out a very common, repetitive English phrase used in professional settings.
- Builds empathy by having the presenter admit she used to struggle with the same issue.
- Introduces the app as the practical solution to this relatable problem.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
SPEAK ENGLISH CONFIDENTLY!
Supernova AI
Interview में हमेशा "I'm fine, thank you" बोलना बंद करो।
I'm fine, thank you
I don't know
You are welcome
सच बताऊँ, मेरी English भी ऐसी ही थी, फिर मैंने Supernova try किया।
Let me show you.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Wait. क्या आप बिना डरे English बोलना सीखना चाहते हैं? [Wait. Do you want to learn to speak English without fear?]
Character B says: कोई magic नहीं है, ये Supernova है। आपका AI tutor जो बात करते हुए आपकी गलतियाँ सुधारता है। [There's no magic, this is Supernova. Your AI tutor that corrects your mistakes while you talk.]
Character B says: Let's try it together. [Let's try it together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Replaces the unrealistic 'fluent in 1 week' claim with a more grounded, confidence-building hook.
- Introduces the AI tutor concept, emphasizing that it corrects mistakes naturally during conversation.
- Invites the user into a live demonstration.
scenes.supernova_on_screen_text:
Wait.
क्या आप बिना डरे English बोलना सीखना चाहते हैं?
SPEAK ENGLISH WITHOUT FEAR!
कोई magic नहीं है, ये Supernova है।
आपका AI tutor जो बात करते हुए आपकी गलतियाँ सुधारता है।
Let's try it together.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: A little bit. [A little bit.]
Character B says: Where are you from? [Where are you from?]
Character A says: I am Jaipur. [I am Jaipur.]
Character B says: Almost! You should say: "I am from Jaipur." [Almost! You should say: "I am from Jaipur."]
Character A says: मैं हमेशा इसमें confuse हो जाती हूँ। [I always get confused with this.]
Character B says: That is exactly why I am here, बिना judge किये आपकी English सुधारने के लिए। [That is exactly why I am here, to improve your English without judging you.]
Character A says: But... private tutors तो बहुत महँगे होते हैं। [But... private tutors are very expensive.]
Character B says: Supernova के साथ आपको महँगी classes की ज़रूरत नहीं है। रोज़ practice करो, बहुत ही affordable price में। [With Supernova you don't need expensive classes. Practice daily, at a very affordable price.]
Character A says: Are you serious? [Are you serious?]
Character B says: Absolutely. Real life situations जैसे interview या shopping की practice करो अपने AI tutor के साथ। [Absolutely. Practice real life situations like interviews or shopping with your AI tutor.]
Character A says: Like... a real tutor? [Like... a real tutor?]
Character B says: Yes. मैं आपकी grammar और pronunciation ठीक करता हूँ, ताकि आप confidence से बोल सकें। [Yes. I correct your grammar and pronunciation, so you can speak with confidence.]
Character A says: Okay... मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। [Okay... I am going to download Supernova right now.]
Character B says: Great decision. Let's speak English together. [Great decision. Let's speak English together.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Demonstrates the core product value: a safe, non-judgmental space to make mistakes and get real-time corrections.
- Overcomes the cost objection by positioning Supernova as a highly affordable alternative to expensive private tutors (removing the 'free' claim).
- Highlights practical, real-world use cases (interviews, shopping) relevant to the target demographic.

- Reinforces brand recognition with the app name and app store badges.
